parameters.query: SELECT solicitation_number, opp_title, agency, dept, gda_score, gda_label, naics_code, set_aside, response_deadline, estimated_value, data_source FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE last_refreshed > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND gda_score >= 40 ORDER BY gda_score DESC LIMIT 20;

SELECT solicitation_number, opp_title, agency, gda_score, gda_label, response_deadline, EXTRACT(DAY FROM response_deadline - NOW()) as days_left FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE response_deadline BETWEEN NOW() AND NOW() + INTERVAL '14 days' AND gda_score >= 40 ORDER BY response_deadline ASC LIMIT 15;

SELECT title, source, category, relevance_score, url, LEFT(body, 300) as body_preview, created_at FROM gda_intel_feed WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' ORDER BY relevance_score DESC LIMIT 10;

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_plans, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') as active_plans, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days') as stale_plans, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN contract_value ~ '^[0-9]' THEN contract_value::numeric ELSE 0 END), 0) as total_pipeline_value FROM gda_capture_plans;
INSERT INTO gda_daily_briefs (brief_data, stats, generated_at) VALUES ($1::jsonb, $2::jsonb, NOW())
